targetTranslation: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to tell what was revealed)

ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "It has been revealed to me that a group of the jinn listened and said, 'Indeed, we have heard an amazing Qur’ān [i.e., recitation].

ayahArabic: يَهْدِىٓ إِلَى ٱلرُّشْدِ فَـَٔامَنَّا بِهِۦ وَلَن نُّشْرِكَ بِرَبِّنَآ أَحَدًا
ayahEnglish: It guides to the right course, and we have believed in it. And we will never associate with our Lord anyone.

ayahEnglish: And [it teaches] that exalted is the nobleness of our Lord; He has not taken a wife or a son

ayahArabic: وَأَنَّا كُنَّا نَقْعُدُ مِنْهَا مَقٰعِدَ لِلسَّمْعِ فَمَن يَسْتَمِعِ ٱلْءَانَ يَجِدْ لَهُۥ شِهَابًا رَّصَدًا
ayahEnglish: And we used to sit therein in positions for hearing, but whoever listens now will find a burning flame lying in wait for him.

ayahArabic: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدْرِىٓ أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ أَرَادَ بِهِمْ رَبُّهُمْ رَشَدًا

ayahArabic: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلصَّالِحُونَ وَمِنَّا دُونَ ذٰلِكَ كُنَّا طَرَآئِقَ قِدَدًا
ayahEnglish: And among us are the righteous, and among us are [others] not so; we were [of] divided ways.

ayahArabic: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُۥ هَرَبًا
ayahEnglish: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allāh upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight.

ayahArabic: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُۥ هَرَبًا
ayahEnglish: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allāh upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight.

ayahArabic: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُۥ هَرَبًا
ayahEnglish: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allāh upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight.

targetTranslation: we make him unable (object of نُّعْجِزَ)
ayahArabic: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُۥ هَرَبًا
ayahEnglish: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allāh upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight.

targetTranslation: running away (as the way/manner of escape)
ayahArabic: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُۥ هَرَبًا
ayahEnglish: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allāh upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight.

ayahArabic: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعْنَا ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ فَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِرَبِّهِۦ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخْسًا وَلَا رَهَقًا
ayahEnglish: And when we heard the guidance [i.e., the Qur’ān], we believed in it. And whoever believes in his Lord will not fear deprivation or burden.

targetTranslation: we heard (referring to the jinn speaking in this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعْنَا ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ فَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِرَبِّهِۦ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخْسًا وَلَا رَهَقًا
ayahEnglish: And when we heard the guidance [i.e., the Qur’ān], we believed in it. And whoever believes in his Lord will not fear deprivation or burden.

ayahArabic: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلْمُسْلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا ٱلْقٰسِطُونَ فَمَنْ أَسْلَمَ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوْا۟ رَشَدًا
ayahEnglish: And among us are Muslims [in submission to Allāh], and among us are the unjust. And whoever has become Muslim - those have sought out the right course.

targetTranslation: they sought thoroughly (referring to الْقٰسِطُونَ - those who deviate)
ayahArabic: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلْمُسْلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا ٱلْقٰسِطُونَ فَمَنْ أَسْلَمَ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوْا۟ رَشَدًا
ayahEnglish: And among us are Muslims [in submission to Allāh], and among us are the unjust. And whoever has become Muslim - those have sought out the right course.

ayahArabic: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلْمُسْلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا ٱلْقٰسِطُونَ فَمَنْ أَسْلَمَ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوْا۟ رَشَدًا
ayahEnglish: And among us are Muslims [in submission to Allāh], and among us are the unjust. And whoever has become Muslim - those have sought out the right course.

ayahArabic: وَأَمَّا ٱلْقٰسِطُونَ فَكَانُوا۟ لِجَهَنَّمَ حَطَبًا
ayahEnglish: But as for the unjust, they will be, for Hell, firewood.'

targetTranslation: they became straight/upright (on الطَّرِيقَةِ - the way)
ayahArabic: وَأَلَّوِ ٱسْتَقٰمُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسْقَيْنٰهُم مَّآءً غَدَقًا
ayahEnglish: And [Allāh revealed] that if they had remained straight on the way, We would have given them abundant rain [i.e., provision].

targetTranslation: abundant water (as direct object of لَأَسْقَيْنٰهُم - we would surely give them to drink)
ayahArabic: وَأَلَّوِ ٱسْتَقٰمُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسْقَيْنٰهُم مَّآءً غَدَقًا
ayahEnglish: And [Allāh revealed] that if they had remained straight on the way, We would have given them abundant rain [i.e., provision].

ayahArabic: وَأَلَّوِ ٱسْتَقٰمُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسْقَيْنٰهُم مَّآءً غَدَقًا
ayahEnglish: And [Allāh revealed] that if they had remained straight on the way, We would have given them abundant rain [i.e., provision].

targetTranslation: he turns away (condition for يَسْلُكْهُ - He will make him enter)
ayahArabic: لِّنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ وَمَن يُعْرِضْ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّهِۦ يَسْلُكْهُ عَذَابًا صَعَدًا
ayahEnglish: So We might test them therein. And whoever turns away from the remembrance of his Lord He will put into arduous punishment.

ayahArabic: لِّنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ وَمَن يُعْرِضْ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّهِۦ يَسْلُكْهُ عَذَابًا صَعَدًا
ayahEnglish: So We might test them therein. And whoever turns away from the remembrance of his Lord He will put into arduous punishment.

ayahEnglish: So We might test them therein. And whoever turns away from the remembrance of his Lord He will put into arduous punishment.

targetTranslation: a difficult ascent (object of يَسْلُكْهُ - He will make him go through)

ayahArabic: وَأَنَّ ٱلْمَسٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدْعُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدًا
ayahEnglish: And [He revealed] that the masjids are for Allāh, so do not invoke with Allāh anyone.

ayahArabic: وَأَنَّ ٱلْمَسٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدْعُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدًا
ayahEnglish: And [He revealed] that the masjids are for Allāh, so do not invoke with Allāh anyone.

ayahEnglish: And [He revealed] that the masjids are for Allāh, so do not invoke with Allāh anyone.

targetTranslation: anyone (object of تَدْعُوا - do not call/invoke)
ayahArabic: وَأَنَّ ٱلْمَسٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدْعُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدًا
ayahEnglish: And [He revealed] that the masjids are for Allāh, so do not invoke with Allāh anyone.

targetTranslation: when (referring to عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ قَامَ - when the servant of Allah stood)

ayahEnglish: And that when the Servant [i.e., Prophet] of Allāh stood up supplicating Him, they almost became about him a compacted mass."

targetTranslation: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)
ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى وَلَآ أُشْرِكُ بِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "I only invoke my Lord and do not associate with Him anyone."

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى وَلَآ أُشْرِكُ بِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "I only invoke my Lord and do not associate with Him anyone."

ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "I only invoke my Lord and do not associate with Him anyone."

ayahEnglish: Say, "Indeed, I do not possess for you [the power of] harm or right direction."

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنِّى لَآ أَمْلِكُ لَكُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا رَشَدًا

ayahEnglish: Say, "Indeed, I do not possess for you [the power of] harm or right direction."

targetTranslation: right guidance (object of أَمْلِكُ - I possess/control)

ayahEnglish: Say, "Indeed, I do not possess for you [the power of] harm or right direction."

targetTranslation: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)
ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنِّى لَن يُجِيرَنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدٌ وَلَنْ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلْتَحَدًا
ayahEnglish: Say, "Indeed, there will never protect me from Allāh anyone [if I should disobey], nor will I find in other than Him a refuge.

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنِّى لَن يُجِيرَنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدٌ وَلَنْ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلْتَحَدًا
ayahEnglish: Say, "Indeed, there will never protect me from Allāh anyone [if I should disobey], nor will I find in other than Him a refuge.

ayahEnglish: Say, "Indeed, there will never protect me from Allāh anyone [if I should disobey], nor will I find in other than Him a refuge.

targetTranslation: a delivering/conveyance (of a message from اللَّهِ)
ayahArabic: إِلَّا بَلٰغًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِسٰلٰتِهِۦ وَمَن يَعْصِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا
ayahEnglish: But [I have for you] only notification from Allāh, and His messages." And whoever disobeys Allāh and His Messenger - then indeed, for him is the fire of Hell; they will abide therein forever.

ayahArabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوْا۟ مَا يُوعَدُونَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَضْعَفُ نَاصِرًا وَأَقَلُّ عَدَدًا
ayahEnglish: [The disbelievers continue] until, when they see that which they are promised, then they will know who is weaker in helpers and less in number.

targetTranslation: they saw (when they see what they were promised)

ayahEnglish: [The disbelievers continue] until, when they see that which they are promised, then they will know who is weaker in helpers and less in number.

ayahEnglish: [The disbelievers continue] until, when they see that which they are promised, then they will know who is weaker in helpers and less in number.

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنْ أَدْرِىٓ أَقَرِيبٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمْ يَجْعَلُ لَهُۥ رَبِّىٓ أَمَدًا
ayahEnglish: Say, "I do not know if what you are promised is near or if my Lord will grant for it a [long] period."

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنْ أَدْرِىٓ أَقَرِيبٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمْ يَجْعَلُ لَهُۥ رَبِّىٓ أَمَدًا

ayahEnglish: [He is] Knower of the unseen, and He does not disclose His [knowledge of the] unseen to anyone

ayahArabic: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱرْتَضَىٰ مِن رَّسُولٍ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَسْلُكُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِۦ رَصَدًا
ayahEnglish: Except whom He has approved of messengers, and indeed, He sends before him [i.e., each messenger] and behind him observers

ayahArabic: لِّيَعْلَمَ أَن قَدْ أَبْلَغُوا۟ رِسٰلٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ وَأَحْصَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ عَدَدًۢا
ayahEnglish: That he [i.e., Muḥammad (ﷺ)] may know that they have conveyed the messages of their Lord; and He has encompassed whatever is with them and has enumerated all things in number.
